blockingIssues.description: Bundle-size gate remains unresolved: recorded and current evidence report dist/index.js at 994583 bytes, which exceeds the schema milestone threshold of <= 990000 bytes.

Tool-schema de-duplication remains incomplete: src/tools/schemas.ts still contains manually redeclared tool arg shapes and src/tools/runtime-tools.ts still includes a duplicated flow_plan_apply args declaration instead of consuming fully runtime-derived schemas.

rejectedObservations.observation: Shared architecture docs should define additional coupling rules for OpenCode tool({ args }) declarations and runtime-derived schemas.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented: .factory/library/architecture.md already states that tool-arg schemas are derived from runtime schemas; current issue is implementation drift, not missing shared-state documentation.

rejectedObservations.observation: core-worker verification should treat bun run check as sufficient evidence instead of explicit deadcode/build entries.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: this process-gap recommendation was already captured in round 1 guidance updates for the core-worker skill.
